message:
feat(Lib): Implement 7 internal/Easter egg Python modules

Implement CPython internal modules and famous Easter eggs in Zig:

__hello__.zig (~70 lines):
- Simple "Hello world!" test module for import system testing
- getMessage(), main(), init/reset functions

__phello__.zig (~96 lines):
- Package version of __hello__ with spam submodule
- Tests package import functionality

_py_abc.zig (~301 lines):
- ABCRegistry for tracking virtual subclasses and abstract methods
- ABCMeta metaclass with method registration
- Cache invalidation and instance checking
- hasAllAbstractMethods() helper function

_py_warnings.zig (~496 lines):
- Full WarningCategory enum (12 categories)
- FilterAction enum (default, error, ignore, always, module, once)
- WarningFilter with pattern matching
- WarningsState manager with filter chains
- formatWarning(), warn(), warnExplicit() functions
- simpleFilter() and filterWarnings() helpers

_sitebuiltins.zig (~298 lines):
- Quitter for quit()/exit() with platform-specific EOF hints
- Printer for copyright, credits, license display
- Helper for help() interactive mode
- Full copyright/credits/license text

antigravity.zig (~203 lines):
- XKCD 353 Easter egg implementation
- Geohash algorithm from XKCD 426 (date + Dow Jones -> coordinates)
- fly() function to open browser
- Cross-platform browser opening (open/xdg-open/start)

this.zig (~274 lines):
- The Zen of Python by Tim Peters
- ROT13 encoded text (s) matching CPython
- Full cipher table (d) for decoding
- rot13(), decode(), rot13Comptime() functions
- getAphorism() for individual Zen lines
- printZen(), printRandom() display functions

All modules include comprehensive tests.
